The '''MD-7 medical droid''' was a model of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] and a part of the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series]] that was manufactured by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. MD-7s were experts in emergency trauma. The line was a prototype model used only in limited sectors, like the [[MD-8 medical droid|MD-8]] and [[MD-9 medical droid|MD-9]] units.<ref name="EGTD" /> At least one MD-7 was permanently assigned to the executive section of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]].<ref name="BTS">''[[Before the Storm]]''</ref>
